description.unified: Attacks the enemy with the lowest M.DEF 3 times, dealing M.DMG and stunning them for [1 sec->0.6sec]. If the target is under [Target Lock On], deals additional M.DMG. The final hit inflicts [Target Lock On] on the enemy for 10sec. [(removed) M.Block rate decreased by 500]

Deals M.DMG to enemies in range and stuns them for [2 sec->1.2sec]. Then moves to the ally with the [lowest P.DEF->highest DMG dealt], creating a [Shield] on the target and self that absorbs ATK DMG for [10 sec->6sec], and [(added) increases Status Resistance by 60%]. This effect does not activate if there are no allies.

Moves to the enemy with the lowest current HP, dealing M.DMG, then returns to the farthest ally. If the target is not a Hero, deals additional M.DMG. If the target is killed by this skill or is a Boss, uses [Check & Guard].

If there is an enemy under [Target Lock On], increases ATK by value, and all skills prioritize enemies under [Target Lock On]. When a [Target Lock On] enemy dies, inflicts another enemy with the lowest M.DEF with [Target Lock On] for 10sec. [Target Lock On]: Increases M.DMG taken by 20%. This effect cannot be dispelled.

light.unified: When there is an enemy affected by 'Target Lock On', Crit Chance is increased by [400->300].

dark.unified: When there is an enemy affected by 'Target Lock On', DMG taken is reduced by [30%->{2}%].

description.unified: [Target Lock On] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's M.Crit Resist by [500->160] for 10 sec.
[Restrain and Protect] Reduces Mana Cost by [1->1000], and on Critical Hit, recovers {0} Mana.
[Assassination] Increases DMG by 50%, and on Critical Hit, increases own ATK by {0}% for [10 sec->14 sec].
[Target Elimination] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and every 5 sec, stuns enemies under 'Target Lock On' for {0} sec.

When attacking an enemy affected by 'Target Lock On', deals additional Magic DMG equal to [{1}%->{0}%] of ATK and increases ATK SPD by 1%. ATK SPD stacks up to [{0}->{1}] times, and this effect can only trigger once every [2 sec->1 sec].

Places Endless Acceleration, Riventina on the ground for 10sec, attacking the enemy with the lowest M.DEF, dealing M.DMG and inflicting [Target Lock On]. [Endless Acceleration]: Every 3sec, attacks an enemy, dealing M.DMG and stunning for [2 sec->1.2sec]. Prioritizes enemies affected by [Target Lock On].

1.from: Upon activation, Increases Mirianne's Crit DMG by 100% and ACC by 300 for 10 sec.
1.to: For the duration, increases Mirianne’s Crit DMG by 72%.
1.unified: For the duration, increases Mirianne’s Crit DMG by [100%->72%]. [(removed) ACC by 300]

2.from: Upon activation, [Assassination] ignores the enemy's DEF, and Increases its DMG by 30% for 10 sec.
2.to: For the duration, increases [Assassination] DMG by 50%.
2.unified: For the duration, increases [Assassination] DMG by [30%->50%]. [(removed) ignores enemy's DEF]
